scripts.emulators:functions: npm run guard:firebase && npm --prefix app exec firebase -- --project compliance-hub-v2 emulators:start --only functions,firestore
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run guard:firebase && npm --prefix app exec firebase -- --project compliance-hub-v2 deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:firestore: npm run guard:firebase && npm --prefix app exec firebase -- --project compliance-hub-v2 deploy --only firestore:rules,firestore:indexes
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix app install && npm --prefix app/functions install
